title: Ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, Phi-3, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, push models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client; simple API to chat, generate, create, pull, list, delete models running in Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration; use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI wrapper with REPL, conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline GitHub-Copilot-like assistants.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list models with fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat and generate completions.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose samples for running Ollama server plus CPU/GPU variants.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and persistent storage.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Deepset Haystack integration; use Ollama models as generators or chat engines in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI Codex using Ollama; powers CLI code completion and explanation.

title: ollama-ui
summary: Lightweight React-based chat UI that proxies to Ollama; runs entirely in browser or as static site.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models for summarization, Q&A, and brainstorming inside notes.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community node for n8n workflow automation; integrate Ollama chat/generate steps into no-code flows.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any channel with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that exposes Ollama models via DMs and app mentions with conversation memory.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js starter that mounts OpenAI-compatible routes backed by Ollama for rapid prototyping.
